reason: Bitcoin is entering a markdown phase, having slipped below a critical price level due to geopolitical instability (tanker attacks pushing oil above $100) and general macro headwinds. The significant decline in crypto developer commits and a recent platform hack (Bonk.fun) further weigh on sentiment and indicate broader ecosystem challenges. While unified regulatory oversight by the SEC and CFTC could bring long-term clarity, the immediate impact adds an element of uncertainty. XRP's technical setup is an outlier against the broader bearish indicators. Investors should remain cautious.
headlines: Crypto code commits fall 75% as developers move to AI projects
XRP steadies near $1.38 as Bollinger squeeze hints at breakout before CPI
Bitcoin slips below $69,500 as tanker attacks send oil back above $100
Bonk.fun hacked: Domain hijacked, crypto drainer planted
SEC, CFTC end years of rivalry with deal that will mean combined crypto oversight
